evals.name: bootstrap-fresh-macos-machine
evals.prompt: I am on a fresh macOS machine and just cloned this repository. Nothing is installed yet under ~/.codex/skills or ~/.opencli/plugins. What should I do next to get this packaged workflow ready to use?

evals.name: doctor-apple-events-remediation
evals.prompt: Use trends-radar on an already-installed machine where collection is failing because Google Chrome cannot run JavaScript from Apple Events. Guide the user through the next step without skipping past remediation.

evals.name: collect-rising-queries
evals.prompt: Use trends-radar to help me collect rising queries from several Google Trends compare tabs that I already prepared in Chrome.

evals.name: generic-google-trends-request
evals.prompt: Can you give me a quick summary of what is trending on Google Trends today in the United States?
